titleStmt.title: SII 26.263: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 263. (A.R. No. 248 of 1909.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Brahmēśvara temple.

p.hi: Vīra-Vijayabhūpatirāya, son of Vīra-Dēvarāya (I): Ś. 1331, Virōdhi, Vṛiśchika (Aippaśi)-śu. 10., Uttiraṭṭādi = 1409 A.D., October 18 (Friday). The nakshatra Uttiraṭṭādi comes on the next day.

summary.p: This inscription is built in the middle. It records a gift, made by the king, of one half of the revenue from some puñjai land, garden, and ponds and one half of all items of revenue except the tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam, from the four villages namely Pāchchal, Paṉaikkaṟai, Kuṟumbaṟai and Virundāṇḍāṉputtūr to the god Brahmīśvaramuḍaiyār of Tīruppeṟṟūr alias Śrī-Mādhava-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Eyiyil-nāḍu in Nikarilichōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . manmahā viradevarāyan śrīviravijayabhūpatirāyaṉ pradhivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 3 10 1ṉ meṟcellāniṉṟa virotisamvatsarattu vṛścikanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu daśemiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭātināḷ nikarilicoḻamaṇṭalattu Eyiyil nāṭṭu tiruppeṟṟūr Āṉa śrīmādhavaccaturvvedimaṅgalattu nāyaṉār brahmiśvara- muṭaiyanāyaṉārkku
vijayabhūpatirāya ḷḷatevatāṉamum kollaikāṭum Āṇṭār kuṭṭai kūttāṭuntevar kuṭ(ṭai)taḷittoppu Eḻuventaṉ kuṭṭaiyil Oṉṟupātiyum pāccal paṉaikkaṟai kuṟumpaṟai viruntāṇṭāṉ puttūr Āka Innālūrilum tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam nīṅkalāka tevatāṉam Oṉṟupātiyum Ittāluḷḷa naṉcey puṉcey nāṟpāṟkellaikku Uṇṭāṉa siddhāyam E tiṟai maṉaitiṟai kāṇikkai kaṭṭāyam caṭittam
maṭakkuvari nattavari Āyam yiṭai kammātam maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa sakala Upātikaḷum vipūtikāṇikkai Uḷḷūr Ūrviṉiyokamum Uṭpaṭa Iṉṉāyaṉārkkup pūcai tiruppaṇikkum tirunāḷukkum terkkum sarvvamāṉyam Āka candrādityavaraiyum cellakkaṭavatu Ākavum Inta tarmmattukku Ahitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ gaṅgaikkaraiyiṟ kurāṟpacukkoṉṟāṉ pāvattiṟ paṭuvāṉ Itu panmā heśvara rakṣai śivamastu §
Digital edition of SII 26.263 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
